job_summary: A Project CRA plays a hybrid role combining monitoring responsibilities with project coordination and oversight.
key_responsibilities: Manage site monitoring activities within a project
Support Clinical Trial Managers in project execution
Track timelines, deliverables, and site performance
Assist in risk management and issue resolution
career_path: Project CRA → Clinical Trial Manager → Project Manager
skills_required: assist in risk management and issue resolution

support clinical trial managers in project execution
